entry.title: Re: Source list: valid date
entry.content:
Hello @tomas_martinez18 , You can please go head and adding new contract in existing source, this will give insights or tracking about procurement strategy followed in past.

While adding contract, please make sure validity date maintained correctly.

Regards

Prasath

entry.title: 8D Reporting and Print Form in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud: Availability, Integration, and Licensing
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

Our team is looking into quality management features in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, particularly around 8D reporting. We have a few specific questions and would appreciate any guidance:

  1. Availability: Is there a standard 8D reporting tool and print form natively available within SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, or would custom development or third-party integration be necessary for this functionality?

  2. Integration with SAP BTP: If native 8D reporting is not available, is it feasible to integrate an 8D report and print form using SAP BTP? We’d appreciate recommendations on the most effective way to leverage SAP BTP for this enhancement in quality management.

  3. Licensing Considerations: Would utilizing SAP BTP for enabling or extending 8D reporting and print form capabilities involve additional licensing costs? Insights into the licensing model for such integrations would be extremely helpful.

Thank you for any insights and experiences shared!

entry.title: MCQ Cnnfirmation
entry.content:
I am currently undergoing training in the course "Getting Started with SAP HCM and HCM Payroll." After completing the quiz for Chapter 3, I found that my answer was marked incorrect. I selected **Option B**, Where Mcqs Was:

 
Q2.What is meant by the integration of Personnel Administration and Organizational Management?
A: The cost center relationship is inherited from Organizational Management if Controlling is integrated
B: Every detail of the organizational structure can be used as default values in Personnel Administration
 
I later asked this question to three different AI tools (ChatGPT, Gemini, and Poe), and they all provided the same answer, confirming that Option B was correct. Please Guide me in this Error.

entry.title: Re: Import Sales Orders (Part 9): Creation with Reference
entry.content: Hi @priya_sshekhar, in the Cloud version, the function has been released. But not avaible in OP, you can raise requirement for OP version.

entry.title: BR0100E Internal error for 'backup_status: at location BrDbfBackCheck-3
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts;

In my SAP ERP system running on Oracle DB, lately I am noticing my backup is failing with the following errors:

BR0100E Internal error for 'backup_status: /oracle/SID/sapdata2/sr3_127/sr3.data127' at location BrDbfBackCheck-3
BR0340I Switching to the next online redolog filefor database instance SID ...
BR0321I Switch to the next online redolog file for database instance SID successful
BR0202I Saving space_log
BR0301E SQL error -1142 at location BrTspBackAlter-3, SQL statement:
'/* BRBACKUP */ ALTER TABLESPACE "PSAPSR3" END BACKUP'
ORA-01142: cannot end online backup - none of thefiles are in backup
BR0318E 'Alter tablespace PSAPSR3 end backup' failed
BR0054I BRBACKUP terminated with errors

 

I tried to re-run it, but the same errors keep coming, I am monitoring the logs via DB13.

 

Your feedback will be appreciated.

 

Best regards

Amal Aloun

entry.title: Re: SmartFilterBar does not work after navigation
entry.content:
for me working

onInit: function () {
            const oODataModel = this.getOwnerComponent().getModel();
            this.getView().setModel(oODataModel);
            this.getOwnerComponent().getRouter().getRoute("Page11").attachPatternMatched(this.onRoutePatternMatched, this);
           
        },
        onRoutePatternMatched: function () {
            const smartFilterBar = this.getView().byId("id11SmartFilterBar");
            if (smartFilterBar) {
                if (!smartFilterBar.isInitialised()) {
                    smartFilterBar.attachInitialise(function () {
                        smartFilterBar.search();
                    });
                } else {
                    smartFilterBar.search();
                }
            }
           
        }

entry.title: Re: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 Available Now
entry.content:
Hi @tarzibou ,

Thanks for getting in touch. I'm always interested in such projects. However, I don't quite understand: You have a SUSE distro inside a Docker container sitting on a Debian distro inside a VM Workstation - is that right? What is the advantage of that setup? It sounds relatively slow.

What am I missing?
Thanks and best wishes,

Julie.

entry.title: Re: Service Contract Cancell Reason
entry.content:
Hello,

Yes, you can add more reasons for canceling a Service Contract Item in SAP S/4HANA Cloud by customizing the Cancellation Reason field. This customization is performed through the "Manage Your Solution" application, where you can adapt the standard list to include additional reasons specific to your business needs.

To add new cancellation reasons:
1. Navigate to the "Manage Your Solution" app.
2. Go to Settings for Rejection Reasons.

Best regards,

Dequan Xu

Hi Team,

I have imported the walkthrough of ui5 sdk in web ide by mistake. Earlier version of walkthrough was in web ide, it was now migrated to BAS. So, it has .yaml, npm too. npm has been installed but by mistake I imported the code in web ide. I need to rectify, I am doing the code in VS Studio.

Kaushik

SAP UI5/Fiori

entry.title: Re: Cloud Integration requirement
entry.content:
Hello @ramu_g4 ,

Yes, the Kafka adapter can work with a CPI instance hosted in the public cloud, but the kafka broker must be accessible form internet. This is generally preferred way, so many at times they would not agree for this approach. The other way around would be to use a VPN. We will have to leverage a cloud connector which can connect with CPI and kafka broker within same VPN.

entry.title: Re: How to extend 500 GL codes to 4 new company codes
entry.content: You could do this with FS15 only

entry.title: Re: Sales Order Creation - BAdi for S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content: Is there any new finding? I'm also looking for BADI, which can be triggered after sales document(order, delivery, billing, purchasing...) saving to DB.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to consider the stock from two storage...
entry.content:
Hello @RaghavanKathamuthu 

MRP areas by definition are planned separately. Therefore you can not have them separated from sales orders point of view and combined from production order perspective.

What you can do however is implement Stock Determination in production orders and customize the strategy so production storage location is picked first and if stock is not available there, then sales storage location is picked next.

Stock determination is customized in Materials Management -> Inventory Management and Physical Inventory -> Stock Determination -> ...

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: How to Pass Dynamic Selection Field in SAP ABAP Submi...
entry.content: Check online documenttion for WITH FREE SELECTIONS texpr  which contains a sample code to build the texpr structure.

entry.title: Re: Do service orders take into account common distributi...
entry.content:
Hello,

In SAP S/4HANA Cloud, for service orders dealing with non-stock materials that are externally sourced, the system relies on the material master data being properly configured and extended to the relevant organizational levels. This typically includes sales organization, distribution channel, and plant.

When you encounter an issue with the material not being extended to the specified distribution channel, it could potentially point towards a misconfiguration in the material master or the organizational structure settings. Common distribution channels are designed to streamline the master data maintenance by allowing materials to be extended to multiple distribution channels without individual extensions. However, this setup needs to be properly configured in the system to function correctly.

For the common distribution channel to work effectively with service orders in S/4HANA Cloud, you can check the following:
1. **Material Master Configuration**: The material needs to be maintained correctly in the material master, with appropriate settings to ensure it covers the common distribution channel setup.
2. **Common Distribution Channel Setup**: Under Logistics General in Customizing, you need to set up the common distribution channel and assign it to sales organizations and distribution channels as needed.


3. **Check Organizational Data in Service Order**: Ensure that the service order has the correct organizational data, including the distribution channel that aligns with where the material is extended.

Best regards,

Dequan Xu

entry.title: Options to restrict Proxy Rights for specific users?
entry.content:
Hi everyone, 

I have a requirement to restrict proxy rights for managers in the organizations, who should only be able to assign other managers as their own proxy.

However, it does not seem possible to do this. The function "manage proxy" would allow users to not only assign a proxy for themselves, but also for other users, and could easily abuse the function by assigning themselves as the proxy of someone else.

This leaves me with only the proxy function under the settings, which is managed through the company and logo settings. I don't see a way how I could restrict this function to apply only to managers instead of the whole company.

Does anyone have some ideas how I could make the requirement work?

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Re: Catch CONVT_NO_NUMBER runtime error in OO ABAP Program
entry.content:
You can also use

TRY.
  numeric_variable = EXACT #( character_variable ).
  CATCH cx_sy_conversion_no_number.
ENDTRY.

entry.title: How to bypass the login page and directly proceed to the required page using access_token with Auth2
entry.content:
hi,
Is it possible to skip the auth login page and directly navigate to my custom login page? if yes plz tell me.

the current process is

myApp=>authO Login page=>social web site login page=> Back to my App (if successful login page)

I want to skip the auth login page.
hi, I am an SAP BTP developer and I added Xsuaa security to my application. and also use CIS identity provider.
so my question is when I share or deploy my fullstack application and end-user use that application the CIS provides its login page. I have my login page in my application too.
so how I can authorize the users who are available in my database and access that Auth2 Token so I can bypass that identity provider’s login page and authenticate users with my login page?

entry.title: Re: Process to generate Key Pair X.509 certificate from t...
entry.content:
Hi,

we got the answer as below from our local colleagues in Argentina.

Best regards,

Nils Buerckel

In Argentina, in order to generate the digital certificate for e-invoicing web service, the company needs to have for homologation (test environment) a CUIT ID with password level 3 (any AR natural person). For production environment, the legal representative of the company with an authorized CUIT number could request it. In the following page, it is explained how they should do it, it is in Spanish, as it is a government tax agency page:

https://www.afip.gob.ar/ws/documentacion/certificados.asp

the customer will be able to see how to get the certificate for homologation environment and or production environment (see attached picture).

Many thanks for your help in advanced. 

you can check the process as the below screenshot showing. 
looking forward for your feedback.

entry.title: Re: To track Urgent orders in App->My Inbox
entry.content:
Hello,

To address the requirement of tracking urgent sales orders marked via a custom field (e.g., `IsSOUrgent`) in the My Inbox app without setting up a complex and maintenance-heavy additional workflow, you can consider utilizing the Situation Handling framework available in SAP S/4HANA Cloud. This framework allows you to automate the monitoring and notification process for specific business situations as defined by your business needs.

Here's how you can leverage Situation Handling to manage urgent sales orders:

1. **Define a Situation Type for Urgent Sales Orders**:
- You would create a situation type specifically for sales orders where the `IsSOUrgent` field is marked. This situation type can be configured to automatically trigger notifications or actions when an urgent sales order is detected.

2. **Automatic Notification**:
- Once the situation type is activated, responsible users can get automatically notified when a sales order is marked as urgent. This ensures prompt attention without manual intervention to check the status regularly.

3. **Actionable Insights**:
- In the My Inbox app, users can receive direct links to the urgent sales orders, allowing them to take appropriate actions swiftly. Additionally, this can be configured to provide options like accelerating the approval process or prioritizing these orders in logistics.

4. **Manage and Adapt Situation Types**:
- You can manage the conditions, recipients, and actions of the situation type according to changing business requirements through the Manage Situation Types app.

This approach not only reduces the manual effort involved in tracking such sales orders but also enhances the responsiveness and adaptability of your operations to critical business requirements. It avoids the complexities of modifying the existing workflow for sales orders, making the system easier to maintain and manage.

For detailed instructions on setting up Situation Handling for sales orders and using the Manage Situation Types app, you can refer to the following links:
- [Manage Situation Types](https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/a376cd9ea00d476b96f18dea1247e6a5/60748ea9f37d4692912578b698aaefee.html)
- [Situation Handling](https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/a376cd9ea00d476b96f18dea1247e6a5/516c8ecb7462453ca430a42481cc33ec.html)

Best regards,

Dequan Xu

entry.title: Re: BADI/EXIT: Only after Sales Order details been saved in the database

entry.title: Re: Sap Webi calculate the first and last assessments in...
entry.content:
Hi Raz11,
since this is less of a technical problem and more of a coding problem let me give you my idea how your goal can be achieved:
First you need to have a way of getting the first and last entry for the current day. In order to get such a list you basically need to split the entire list per patient and order that list by the timestamp ascending which yields a sublist including all measurements for that patient. Next find the first and the last entry. Repeat this step for all patients.
Depending on what technology you are using (all done in OpenSQL or loading the entire medical database into one itab via OpenSQL and extracting the data for each patient into another itab via OpenSQL/ABAP your exact way of doing may differ.

One solution (may not be the most efficient one) is to do a SELECT on the medical database to get all data, a SELECT DISTINCT on the same but just for the patient Ids. Then loop over patient IDs and for each patient IDmake query against the medical itab where you fetch all the data associated with that patient and store them in a third iTab let's call it lt_patient_data. Get the length of that itab via data(lv_tab_size) lines( lt_patient_data). Finally you can access this table via index. Index [1] for the first element, Index [lv_tab_size] for the last entry (ABAP starts at 1 with indexing).

This code snippet should show my idea

 

 

" Get all data
select * from t005 into table (lt_t005).
  
" Get the primary key (PK)
select distinct land1 from t005 into table (lt_laender).
  
" Loop over all the PK values
loop at lt_laender into data(ls_land).
  
  " Query against the main db with the PK
  select * from _t005 as t where land1 = _land-land1 into table (lt_t005_02).
    
  " Get the table size
  data(lv_tab_size) = lines( lt_t005_02 ).
    
  " Retrieve the firs and the last row
  data(ls_first_row) = lt_t005_02[ 1 ].
  data(ls_last_row) = lt_t005_02[ lv_tab_size ].
  
  " Work with the data
  ls_first_row...
  
ENDLOOP.

Edit: For the second question you have to be more specific what your goal is. Meaning what exactly you want to calculate. If you just want one of the like 3 values per patient per day then either first/last entry with indexing OR with a different subselect.

If your goal is to do the calculation of the say first entry for all patients with one SQL statement you should aim to first extract the first measurement per patient from the table and store those data in a second table and then iterate over that secondary table and do the calcs

entry.title: Re: Setup of the SAP Signavio Process Insights connection and content setup request in SAP Signavio

entry.title: Re: Changing field value for "Assigned To" in Work Order...
entry.content:
Hello @roshan89 ,

i took a short look into the Metadata for the WorkOrderOperationCreateUpdate.page (in SSAM 2310) - this field is not available there.

So it will not beeing added by changing in SYCLO --> you will need to develop and integrate the field in the Metadata to be able to edit it.

Regards

Björn

entry.title: Re: How to send SuccessFactors events in real time to CPI using Intelligent Services Center
entry.content: Nice explanation

entry.title: Welcome
entry.content:
Dear course participants,

Welcome to the discussion forum for the course “Putting AI Ethics into Practice at SAP”.

I’m a SAP Learning MOOC project manager and I worked closely with the subject matter experts to create this course for you.

A special note of thanks to our experts Bettina Laugwitz, Khawla Mallat, Vikram Nagendra, Daniel Schmid, Sherene Tan, Saskia Welsch, who have worked diligently on the course content from across all our SAP locations.

SAP believes that artificial intelligence (AI) has the potential to unlock all kinds of opportunities for businesses, governments, and society. However, AI also has the potential to create economic, political, and social challenges.

In this course, you’ll learn the importance and principles of AI ethics, how SAP set up an ethics governance framework, and which rules SAP employees need to follow during the development, deployment, use, and sale of AI systems.

The learning effort to complete this course is approximately 1 hour.

Each lesson includes a video lecture, and at the end of the course, there is a quiz. 

While the course is running, we invite you to post all your content-related questions on this forum so you can discuss them with other learners and get answers directly from the content experts.

Good luck with the quiz and enjoy taking part in the forum!

Thank you for choosing SAP Learning!

Kind regards,
Britta Radicke-Schlinsog

(SAP Learning team)

entry.title: Re: Dynamic Extensions of the Planning Area Defined by the Table Context QRC2 2024
entry.content:
Hi @derekl_johnson, 

Thanks for recognizing this issue. I've noticed that cell input readiness formatting and the table feature "Reason for unplannable data" simply do not work any longer when specifically dynamic extension of planning area is used (in addition to the already known general issues with input readiness detection with Planning Area, which behaves better when DAC enabled dimensions are added to any table axis).
Hope you can provide a timeline soon? As it is indeed not good for user experience and general adoption of planning area's feature (since 2021).

Margit

entry.title: Re: Publish Data - SAP Analytics Cloud

entry.title: Re: Basic Customizing for Stock Investments
entry.content: Very informative

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to consider the stock from two storage...
entry.content:
Hello @RaghavanKathamuthu  Appreciated your time in detailing notes.

There are two components to be answered in your questions,

Make to stock (Production order related MRP area location) and Make to order (Sales order related MRP area location). If you want get Planned order against PIR or against sales order, you have choose respective planning strategy and It does mean you have use the flow as per optimized method. 

In your case PIR is created Plant level for 10 Qty and at Prd location MRP area level PIR created 101B, So that component got expanded to Prd location based MRP area (check location Maintained  at Production version and Material master).

If you want to have Planned order to be at MRP area level, you need have location mapped in Production version (PIR) and sales order(Location).

Regards

Prasath

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud Transactional Data Upload
entry.content:
It may be due to the default hierarchies not including the elements you need.

Please review each dimension that contains a hierarchy.

entry.title: Taking a Shortcut - Navigate from SAP Risk and Assurance Management to your source system
entry.content:
In SAP Risk and Assurance Management, you can quickly access detailed information by navigating from issues or tasks to documents or business data in the source system.

When properly configured, you can navigate directly to documents or business data in the source system to streamline your workflow and enhance your productivity.

You can find a step-by-step procedure on how to configure the navigation targets in the Process Issues Settings app here:

 

Watch the following step-by-step procedure to see how to navigate from an issue to the business data in the source system using the Process Issues app:

 

Watch the following step-by-step procedure to see how to navigate from a task to the business data in the source system using the My Inbox app:

#Gen AI was used to help to generate this content.

Further information

You can find more information Administration Guide for SAP Risk and Assurance Management on the SAP Help Portal or in the following blog post SAP Financial Compliance / Risk and Assurance Management covers much more than Finance.

User Assistance on the SAP Help Portal

Product Page for SAP Risk and Assurance Management https://help.sap.com/ram
Configure Navigation Targets
Prerequisites: App Navigation for Issues and Tasks -> HTTP Destinations

entry.title: Re: Call API returns code 500
entry.content: Before coding in ABAP, test your request via a dedicated software like Postman. Does it work?

entry.title: 4.3 Web Intelligence Data Lineage Challenge
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm looking for an opinion here.

I have recently been exploring the usability of the new Data view functionality available in BI 4.3 Web Intelligence.

One of the use cases is to build 2 queries from the same universe and join these 2 queries with joins that aren't specified in the source universe. A neat solution to an uncommon problem, but a solution all the same.

So I build a data cube with the data from the two queries with my required joins

The two queries have common objects that are not part of the joins made above and the resulting cube renames the object from the child query with a (1). This looks untidy and when I look at resulting cube, I note that I cannot actually identify the data source within the document dictionary, so I decide to rename my objects via object properties to preserve the data lineage

I was not prepared for what happened next - the renaming of an object in Query 1 renamed the object in Query 2 as well. I have not merged dimensions in this report.

The attachment shows an example of this happening using the efashion universe

I opened a ticket with Support and have been told that this is working as expected, but I don't think this makes sense

Does anyone else have an opinion on this?

regards

James

entry.title: Re: Bar chart with distinct count, Percent of total

entry.title: Re: What is the difference between Write and Preprocessin...

preprocessing program (BC-CCM-ADK)
Program that can be run before data archiving to prepare data for archiving and check data for archivability.

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud for planning - Is it truly a limitation?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I updated a public dimension with over 250,000 master data entries and a hierarchy, and it worked fine. Is the following information really accurate?

See Link: https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/boc/3354605674.html 

Kind regards,

Ismail

entry.title: Re: atc error-invalid name ENQUEUE_PROCESSED for DATA/STA...
entry.content:
As already said, the variable name doesn't fit the naming conventions defined in your company.

You forgot to say that the function module was generated by SAP (function modules starting with VIEWFRAME are generated by the Table Maintenance Generator), i.e. it was not written by you.

ATC should not run neither on SAP source code nor on source code generated by SAP. Ask your team to configure ATC to omit all these units of SAP source code.

entry.title: Re: SAP BPA - Environment Variables
entry.content:
Environmental variable will not work for you. The IDP / IAS based solution, proposed by Dan will work, but each change will require IDP or IAS admin privileges. Another solution, where approvers could be managed by designated person without any IDP / IAS admin privileges would be as follows:

1. get a database like HANA Cloud or any other, where you can expose the table vis ODATA and create the approvers table.

2. Build approvers administration app in Build Apps, which uses the approvers table exposed by ODATA and give approvers administrator access to this app.

3. Let approvers administrator put approvers in the table.

4. Create ACTION in SBPA to get data by ODATA from approvers table.

5. Use process variable to store the approver fetched by ACTION for the process.

6. Use this process variable in the "Approvers" field of your approval form.

This solution much more complicated than the one proposed by Dan, but it does not require IDP / IAS admin privileges to maintain approvers.

as described in the article KBA3511498, the comment information provided by a peer recommendation is not available in the new learning experience.

If you have the same interest, I would be happy to receive support via your vote.

Thanks

Conny

entry.title: Re: Sap Webi calculate the first and last assessments in...
entry.content: I found this 4 y/o YT tutorial about SAP BusinessObject Webi https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YNQ3tY7eZDQ at around 40 minutes the person giving the talk is speaking about the input controls which allow some sort of SQL Input. Maybe you get lucky with this. Take the example of the talk, split it by the patient id instead of the year and try to find a FIRST() and LAST() functin to do the indexing part.

entry.title: Re: Projektmanagement mit SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Gibt es die Möglichkeit SAP Best Practice Vorlagen  auch in Deutsch zu erhalten. Unser Projekt ist in Deutsch und nicht alle können so gutes Englisch dass die Vorlagen in Englisch verstanden werden. 

Danke für die Hilfe

Dione

entry.title: Re: Customer Checkout integration with VIVA
entry.content: Hi @ShaikAzmathull, thank you for the response! Is there any documentation available to create a custom plugin? I only can see following links online: https://community.sap.com/t5/crm-and-cx-blogs-by-members/sap-customer-checkout-plugin-development-part-i/ba-p/13375135 and https://community.sap.com/t5/crm-and-cx-blogs-by-members/sap-customer-checkout-plugin-development-part-ii/ba-p/13375920

entry.title: Not able to get Safety Related field in SF LMS API response
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have a CPI Integration that works as a webservice, that will fetch the Courses data from LMS API and give it to a requesting external system.

We only need to fetch the courses for which Safety Related field is marked as True.

Using the LMS API Documentation I found the endpoint that we can use to fetch all the courses:
/learning/odatav4/public/admin/searchItem/v1/Items
But we do not get the Safety Related Field in the response.

Anyone who has worked with LMS APIs who can help here will be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Re: Unable to use SAP API HUB to send REST APIs to SAP Di...
entry.content:
hi Lukas,
Thank you for the proposed solution. 
Everything was configured, the missing part was the Starting URL, since it's a QA tenant, i suppose to select URL contains "test" on it. 
It's working well now. 
Closing this. 

KR,
Sunny

entry.title: Re: How to create custom Cloud foundry Tasks in SAP BTP?
entry.content:
Hello Thomas,

I think you already found the most important sources of information. SAP BTP CF is based on the open source CF distribution that is why the sources you found should apply. 

To try a task execution I just deployed the cf-sample-app-nodejs application to SAP BTP with the name cf-nodejs-bv-test. After the deployment I could execute a task on it with:

cf run-task cf-nodejs-bv-test --command "echo hello" --name example-task

In the application logs the output of the task could be found like:

cf logs cf-nodejs-bv-test --recent
...
   2024-11-11T12:16:39.94+0200 [APP/TASK/example-task/0] OUT hello
...

Additional sources to check are the CF stack docs especially the docs about the cflinuxfs4 receipt which describes what is included in the stack (the root file system of the container) which is currently offered on SAP BTP CF and that is why the echo command from above works . I also found this Stack Overflow discussion interesting which describes e.g. how to execute a Java command with the Java buildpack. I hope this helps further.

entry.title: Re: Not able to get Safety Related field in SF LMS API response
entry.content: Hey everyone, We have a CPI Integration that works as a webservice, fetching Courses data from the LMS API and providing it to an external system. We only need to fetch courses where the Safety Related field is marked as True. Using the LMS API Documentation, I found the endpoint /learning/odatav4/public/admin/searchItem/v1/Items, but it doesn't include the Safety Related field in the response. Has anyone worked with LMS APIs and can help with this? Your assistance would be greatly appreciated! Thanks!

entry.title: Reading the return code from Browser for DocuSign grant code authentication in ABAP
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Manual way:

Putting the url  - https://account-d.docusign.com/oauth/auth?response_type=code&scope=signature&client_id=67a95ba6-82e7-4b78-98fd-1cff98fc95d9&redirect_uri=https://localhost.com

in google chrome and entering the DocuSign id and password. It will generate a return url as below with code:

https://localhost.com/callback?code=eyJ0eXAiOiJNVCIsImFsZyI6IlJTMjU2Iiwia2lkIjoiNjgxODVmZjEtNGU1MS00Y2U5LWFmMWMtNjg5ODEyMjAzMzE3In0.AQoAAAABAAYABwAA30yl9QLdSAgAAGvT7PUC3UgCAJxKBPiRcyhOs83_w0W0bwgVAAEAAAAYAAEAAAAFAAAADQAkAAAANjdhOTViYTYtODJlNy00YTMxLTg2ZmQtMWNmZjk4ZmM5NWQ5IgAkAAAANjdhOTViYTYtODJlNy00YTMxLTg2ZmQtMWNmZjk4ZmM5NWQ5NwDHzTMnA0QeQInEvooQf7l8MAAAT7XL4gLdSA.A_xjZwyZHt-WsC0GOG2r7lrn_4blz68uZ9G63mon7FIwDlVOko387j-3gV7x4VYpGI3uRhsuGFU2Qc2VZdRKVPH5Kf5kqhAq_5a9Ouxn-Wy1Jlg3UDxj0ZCt7Xxqr75ytBPzVoMgw5P5YCDXqJenCpcPmd9UVnN3MW9THx-lrRCqzOajV2_KHiakzZZRusD2k_wCs8qgY43RsLAAdJsxeswswLe6xOYBgFEgiN86ec-WfeUyOlZunTg1Pnmk5qrbadtyWLX5WywU3HrriYXXHwhJBQmDk7Q1aWD1Y7QzNu8ALcJM1oEe-_9Zq7l2ntUFbhPmvp75qEtriOgVVVfu1A

ABAP Development:

We are trying to achieve the same via abap program and are passing initial url but in response we are not able to read the return url. Instead we are getting html text of the url page instead of browser url (return url).

Please suggest how we can achieve this through abap to read the return url from initial url

entry.title: Re: How to make PR Description & HEader Note in ME51N tco...
entry.content:
Not Possible in Standard SAP.

You Cannot Set the Header text field Mandatory for PR.

Use Enhancement on Purchase Requisition MEREQ001

You Can check Enhancements in SMOD by Packages

entry.title: Re: Reprocess Bank Statement Items from Multiple Company...
entry.content:
Hi @Edrilan_Berisha

The options are the same, it is how they operate. In 1909, you can leave the company code blank, enter your customer, click OK and the result list will provide open items from more than 1 company code. In 2023, you have to enter the company code to proceed, even though the field is not marked as required. If you don't enter the company code, it hangs with nothing happening.

Does that make sense?

Thanks

Finbar.

entry.title: Re: Databases not show in choose company list in SAP B1 1...
entry.content:
Dear Darius,

We have install ODBC as your suggestion. and edit host file to Server Name then IP but still cannot connect with Server.

entry.content: Hi @woongkipark, were you able to resolve this issue? I’m encountering a similar problem with sap.ushell.container while implementing cross-navigation in my UI Integration Card that uses as a view component.

entry.title: Re: SAP BPA - Environment Variables

Hi Jakub,

Yes, ODATA is another possibility which probably we will end up going for. I was exploring and hoping that we could achieve it by just using the tools that BPA has within it, but sadly couldn't make it.

Thank you both!

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA "Contact Support" from GUI and Fiori
entry.content: Hi Mark, have you found any additional information how to use /UI2/BADI_EMB_SUPP to connect to Cloud ALM?

entry.title: HOD/HR Able to Edit Job Information via Action Button Before Selecting Event/Reason
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have a specific requirement from one of our customers.

Currently, HODs and HR are able to modify job information from the Action Button (top left corner) before selecting the event and event reasons. However, once the event and event reasons are chosen, the previously filled fields are being saved.

Issue Details:

  • HODs and HR can update any job information fields via the Action Button before specifying the event and event reasons.
  • After selecting the event and event reasons, the system is saving the changes made earlier, even though this should not occur until the event is confirmed.
  • Our rule specifies that fields should only become visible after the correct event reason is selected.
  • Currently, users can make changes to any fields before selecting the event reason, and these changes are being saved irrespective of the event reason chosen.

Expected Behavior:

  • Job information should only be saved and finalized once the event and event reasons are properly selected and confirmed.
  • Fields should become visible and editable only after the relevant event reason is selected.
  • Changes should be saved only after the correct event reason has been specified and confirmed.

Thank you.

entry.title: Use setAccountResidency before calling accounts.register API
entry.content:
Hi,

 

the setAccountResidency is only listed below the WEB SDK in the docu:

But we are not using the WEB SDK nor the screensets for registration but using the accounts.register API.

 

How can we set the data center by using the accounts.register API? Which API should be called? I could not find any info in your docu.

 

Thanks


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Use setAccountResidency before calling accounts.regis...
entry.content:
Hi,

 

The WebSDK is just an interface for the APIs. This means you can use that parameter for 'accounts.register' whether or not the request is coming from an SDK or directly to the API.

Please refer to the following Product Documentation about Global Registration Flow.

 

Best Regards,

SAP Solution Support

entry.title: Incremental price based on miles
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have a requirement where i should do a incremental price condition type with miles in Public Cloud. Our client have a product called mobilization. The requirement is to have a price from 0-50 & 51-100 & 101-200 in miles.

i tried to create a condition type with scales with fixed value. say 0-50 for 1000 usd, 51-100 for 2000 usd, 101-200 for 3000 usd. But the scale is not accepting the given values. and to have +5% for few customers.

Please suggest How can i do this in public cloud.

Regards,

Siva prasad

entry.title: Problema preferencias de impresión
entry.content: Hola, intento imprimir una etiqueta con 'X' ajustes que están configurados en las preferencias de impresión de la impresora pero a la hora de imprimir por SAP, el programa me pone otras preferencias y no sale la etiqueta como debería salir, también añadir que la etiqueta en SAP esta configurada con crystal report y están bien los tamaños, no entiendo porque la configuración esta toda bien y cuando le doy a imprimir me imprime otros tamaños. A alguien le ha pasado o sabe como solucionarlo?

entry.title: Re: btp - Error in xml not appearing
entry.content:
@JJ111 

To enable routing to a different UI5 application, you need to declare the target UI5 app as a component, as described in the document below:

https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/#/topic/fb19f501b16e4e4991eb6a017770945b

When you are developing in BAS, you can enable app to app navigation in the local environment with the help of Fiori tools.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/enable-app-to-app-navigation-in-bas/ba-p/13508694

entry.title: Changing table cell text direction in SAC
entry.content:
Hi all,

Is it possible in SAP Analytics Cloud to have column header text in portrait orientation in the table like in the screenshot below?

Thanks in advance for your help!

Kind regards,

Kristina

entry.title: Re: Troubleshooting SAP Certification discount code for special programs
entry.content:
HII @David_Chaviano  

I registered a case on get support .

case id - 5000048860 

but still i show error -  We are unable to process your order at this time. Please contact your local SAP Training and Adoption office and provide error: price or currency [21-KHP4AWL7]

this is screenshot of ticket raised

this is screenshot of error difference in currency

entry.title: Re: Batch is not picking automatically
entry.content: If batches are maintained properly & still not fetching automatic batches, then check the transaction V/C5 is maintained correctly or not

entry.title: Re: HOD/HR Able to Edit Job Information via Action Button...
entry.content:
@SatishPanda wrote:

Hi Experts,

We have a specific requirement from one of our customers.

Currently, HODs and HR are able to modify job information from the Action Button (top left corner) before selecting the event and event reasons. However, once the event and event reasons are chosen, the previously filled fields are being saved.

Issue Details:

  • HODs and HR can update any job information fields via the Action Button before specifying the event and event reasons.
  • After selecting the event and event reasons, the system is saving the changes made earlier, even though this should not occur until the event is confirmed.
  • Our rule specifies that fields should only become visible after the correct event reason is selected.
  • Currently, users can make changes to any fields before selecting the event reason, and these changes are being saved irrespective of the event reason chosen.

Expected Behavior:

  • Job information should only be saved and finalized once the event and event reasons are properly selected and confirmed.
  • Fields should become visible and editable only after the relevant event reason is selected.
  • Changes should be saved only after the correct event reason has been specified and confirmed.

Thank you.

Hello,
To address your issue: mypoints search

Current Problem:

  • HODs and HR can modify job information before selecting event reasons, and these changes are being saved immediately.

Expected Behavior:

  • Job information should only be saved after event and event reasons are confirmed.

  • Fields should be visible and editable only after selecting the event reason.

Solution:

  • Ensure job information changes are saved only upon confirmation of the event reason.

  • Adjust the system to make fields visible and editable only after the event reason is selected.

    Best Regards,
    James Keen

entry.title: Re: Credit Exposure value not updating
entry.content: Hello, I have the same issue with some customer credit exposure data that is not updated, even after running the program UKM_TRANSFER_VECTOR. How you find any solution to this issue please ?

entry.title: Re: Modeling an advanced Hierarchy with Directory in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hello @Sefan_Linders!

 

Can you please tell me how did you succeed to add the combination "DEPARTMENT" (Hierarchy Name field) and "2" (Node ID field) in the hierarchy table for 2 times while having set up as keys Hierarchy Name & Node ID? The combination is repeating 2 times, and it does not allow me to input it and save the data.

All my local tables used in the data model so far are type Relational data. Should I use something else?

Many thanks in advance! Sorry if I missed something

Kind regards

entry.title: Is it possible to export commodity codes from a list of part numbers in SAP PG1
entry.content: I have a large list of part numbers that I have been asked to find the commodity codes for. I know I can use MM02 to see them individually, but is there a transaction I can put all these part numbers into to see all the commodity codes at once?

entry.title: List of existing UDV in the form
entry.content:
Hello,

Apologies for the silly question, but how can I find the list of all existing UDV used in a form?

I'm setting up the system that was previously managed by another administrator, and I’m getting an error regarding the FMS syntax used in a UDV. I’ve manually reviewed all the fields in the form, but I can’t find the field with the UDV. Maybe there is a table with all UDV's or something like that? Google didn't help (

Thanks!

entry.title: System is not Giving error if Phantom BOM status is 2(Inactive).
entry.content:
I am using Phantom Material BOM for FG material. I have marked Special procurement Key as 50 not at material, I have maintained "50" at component level of FG material BOM. If I am maintaining BOM status 2 (Inactive) at Phantom BOM header and creating the Production order of FG material, System is giving an information message" Error or warning occurred during master data transfer (see log) Message no. C2195". But system is allowing to create process order without Exploding Phantom BOM component".

Please guide if there is any possibility to restrict the system to create Production order if Phantom component BOM is in Inactive status without changing Message no. C2195 to error from Information.

entry.title: Re: I have one Cube for which compression is not working...
entry.content:
Check the KBA:

2121399 Compression of InfoCube requests not possible

entry.title: Re: Open Hub added fields avoid data reload
entry.content:
Hi David

 

Check the KBA:

3456803 RSB_GUI270 - Database table contains data and cannot be deleted

 

br

Roland

entry.title: Join Our Espresso Session: Unlocking the Potential of GenAI in the Utilities Industry on November 19
entry.content:
Dear Utilities Community,

The utility industry is currently undergoing a significant transformation through the use of artificial intelligence. 

AI will have a massive impact on the business processes of utility companies, enabling unprecedented efficiency gains in processes and offering users of IT systems an unprecedented user experience. The consistent decentralization of energy generation, which is of central importance for a sustainable energy transition, will hardly be possible without AI-supported technologies. GenAI will also fundamentally change the way energy suppliers interact with their customers, revolutionizing customer service.

We are delighted to announce our upcoming webcast "Unlocking the Potential of GenAI in the Utilities Industry" on Tuesday, November 19 from 4pm - 4:30pm CET. 

During this session, you will:

  • Gain insights into the strategic priorities related to AI in the utilities industry
  • Explore AI-powered scenarios and use cases across various business functions
  • Learn about SAP solutions with AI capabilities

 

Speakers: 

Stefan Engelhardt: VP Industry Business Unit Utilities at SAP

Bruno Pincolini: Business Development for Utilities at SAP

Please join us next week and register here 

See you there!

entry.title: Re: Open Hub table in SE11 is empty
entry.content:
Hi David

If the openhub is defined to write data to a remote database (via DBCON), then the local OpenHub Table is empty as the data is directly written to the remote database.

 

br

Roland

entry.title: DevOps with SAP BTP hands-on videos now on SAP Learning
entry.content:
In 2021, our colleague @PhilipMugglestone had created a series of hands-on tutorial videos that helped many learners to set up SAP BTP to apply DevOps principles for application development (announcement blog post from that time). As the videos provide a holistic end-to-end view on how to set up the involved SAP BTP services in detail, we still see value in providing those videos, even if some aspects might be outdated. As a result, we now migrated them to SAP Learning.

Please note that the videos were originally published on the SAP HANA Academy YouTube Channel and therefore may contain references to SAP HANA Academy and YouTube that are no longer valid. Also, updates and additional links are provided in the description of several of the videos, so please use them with caution and make sure to check out their full description, as marked in below's screenshot of an example video:

Example of additional information provided in video descriptions

Here the links to the videos on SAP Learning, in the right order:

Title and LinkDescription
IntroductionIntroduction to DevOps with SAP BTP, incl. SAP BTP service entitlements used during the scenario
Getting StartedGet an idea on how to configure a developer landscape in SAP BTP
Develop ApplicationUsage of SAP Business Application Studio, cloning of a Git repository
SAP Continuous Integration and Delivery serviceLearn how to configure and use SAP BTP's Pipeline-as-a-Service offering
SAP Cloud Transport Management Pt 1Here, transport management is getting set up, incl. subscription and creation of SAP BTP subaccounts
SAP Cloud Transport Management Pt 2Creation of destinations to source and target nodes, setup of transport landscape, interplay of pipeline with transport management
SAP Cloud Transport Management Pt 3Handling of the transport along the transport landscape
SAP Alert Notification service for SAP BTPLearn how to use SAP Alert Notification service to automatically send a message to a selected Slack channel whenever transport management starts or finishes an import
SAP Automation Pilot Pt 1Learn how to set up a smoke test using SAP Automation Pilot
SAP Automation Pilot Pt 2Part two of setting up the smoke test that gets executed automatically whenever transport management finishes an import, incl. sending of a status message to your preferred Slack channel

entry.title: Re: Modeling an advanced Hierarchy with Directory in SAP Datasphere
entry.content: Hi @aalbis thanks for catching that, it's a mistake in my screenshot. In reality there is a "valid to" date as part of the key as well, which I used later in the blog post. So just remove the duplicate of that record, the fourth record from the top. I adjusted the image now as well.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to consider the stock from two storage...
entry.content: Why are you talking about make-to-order? MD04 screenshots don't MoT planning segments, do they?

entry.title: Re: DevOps with SAP Business Technology Platform | Hands-on Video Tutorials
entry.content:
Hi all,

The videos have now been migrated to SAP Learning - get more information here: DevOps with SAP BTP hands-on videos now on SAP Lea... - SAP Community

Again, please also see the comments we made for some of the videos in the 'Details' section, such as in case of UI changes since the recording of the videos.

Best regards,
Boris

entry.title: setting of period control method for depreciation key
entry.content:
Hi,

We have business requirement for Asset Depreciation as follows. -

General Ledger Setting:

General Ledger 0L - Fiscal year variant (K4) for IFRS

General Ledger 1L - Fiscal Year Variant(V3) for Local Tax

General Ledger 2L - Fiscal Year Variant(K4)  for Asset Local Tax

Ledger Group (TL) : 2L (leading Ledger) , 1L 

----

Asset Depreciation Area (01) : for 0L

Asset Depreciation Area (03): for 2L

For depreciation area 03, we hope to use the concept of V3 to calculate depreciation

e.g. acquired Date: 20240701 , we want to start calculating depreciation from 202404

      acquired date:202503 , we want to start calculating depreciation from 202409,

For Period control, how can we set?

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content:
Warm welcome to our new members @Ragastra @qazisy3d @SatheeshKumarNendrambaka 

I hope you are going to enjoy your stay in SAP Community. Besides our technical content, I would like to point to our Location Groups in various regions around the world. Great opportunity to connect with local peers. Check them out and join the one which is close to where you live.

Also, you might want to explore our Discover the SAP Community - How-To Video Series - here you find all about SAP Community 😊

entry.title: Re: Advanced Planning (embedded PP-DS in S/4HANA) Test Scripts
entry.content: Hi, did you get a answer or solution for your request?
